Cases"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Daily consolidation jobs"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Scheduled memory imports"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Periodic backups"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Report generation"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Crontab Example"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Edit crontab\ncrontab -e\n\n# Daily consolidation at 3 AM\n0 3 * * * /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate --db /data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Hourly backup\n0 * * * * /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-backup --db /data/mnemosyne.db --dest /backups\n\n# Weekly report (Mondays at 9 AM)\n0 9 * * 1 /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-report --db /data/mnemosyne.db --email admin@example.com\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Script"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate\n\nimport argparse\nfrom mnemosyne import Memory\n\ndef main():\n  parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n  parser.add_argument(\"--db\", required=True)\n  args = parser.parse_args()\n\n  mem = Memory(db_path=args.db)\n  stats_before = mem.stats()\n\n  mem.sleep()  # Run consolidation\n\n  stats_after = mem.stats()\n  print(f\"Consolidated: {stats_after.consolidated_count - stats_before.consolidated_count}\")\n  print(f\"Evicted: {stats_after.evicted_count - stats_before.evicted_count}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n  main()\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc"],["$Ld"],"$Le"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@f"]},null,false,"$@f"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L10",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$11",["$L12"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"X-0SVPoGwgrDsYVNqmHYH"}

8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Backup Script"}]
9:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-backup\n\nimport argparse\nimport shutil\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\ndef main():\n  parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n  parser.add_argument(\"--db\", required=True)\n  parser.add_argument(\"--dest\", required=True)\n  args = parser.parse_args()\n\n  timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\")\n  backup_name = f\"mnemosyne_{timestamp}.db\"\n  dest = Path(args.dest) / backup_name\n\n  shutil.copy2(args.db, dest)\n  print(f\"Backup created: {dest}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n  main()\n","language":"python"}]
